intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: SonnaLab (SONNALAB, RCS Cergy 920978210) is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

dataProtection.title: 3. Data Protection
dataProtection.content: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, modification, disclosure, or destruction.

rights.title: 4. Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.content: In accordance with GDPR, you have the following rights:
items: Right to erasure ('right to be forgotten')

contact.title: 5. Contact Us
contact.content: For any questions regarding this policy or to exercise your rights, contact us at:

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using SonnaLab's services, you agree to be bound by these terms of service.

services.title: 2. Description of Services
services.content: SonnaLab provides web and mobile application development, artificial intelligence, and technical consulting services.

license.title: 3. License to Use
license.content: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use our platform in accordance with these terms.

intellectualProperty.title: 4. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All intellectual property rights to the SonnaLab platform, including source code, design, logos, and documentation, belong to SONNALAB (RCS Cergy 920978210).
intellectualProperty.link: See our complete Intellectual Property Policy

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: SonnaLab shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use of our services.

termination.title: 6. Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to our services in case of violation of these terms.

law.title: 7. Applicable Law
law.content: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Cergy, France.

commitment.title: Our Quality Commitment
commitment.content: SonnaLab is committed to providing high-quality digital solutions that exceed our clients' expectations.

standards.title: 1. Standards and Norms
items: Systematic code reviews by senior developers

process.title: 2. Development Process
process.content: We follow an agile methodology with:

improvement.title: 3. Continuous Improvement
improvement.content: We regularly analyze our processes and gather client feedback to continuously improve the quality of our deliverables.

intro.title: What is a Cookie?
intro.content: A cookie is a small text file stored on your device when you visit our website. It allows us to recognize your browser and remember certain information.

essential.title: Essential Cookies (Required)
essential.content: Necessary for site functionality (authentication, security, language preferences).

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.content: Google Analytics to understand site usage (anonymized). You can opt out.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.content: Used to display relevant advertisements (LinkedIn, Facebook Pixel). With your consent only.

management.title: 2. Cookie Management
management.content: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time via:
items: The consent banner on first site load
Our Preference Center (link at bottom of page)

duration.title: 3. Retention Period
items: Essential cookies: Session or 1 year maximum

ownership.title: 1. SonnaLab Ownership
ownership.content: The SonnaLab platform, including its website, software (source and object code), SDK, API, visual design, user interface, features, documentation, brand name, logos, and all associated materials ("SonnaLab Materials") are the exclusive intellectual property of SONNALAB, registered with RCS Cergy under number 920978210 in France and its licensors.
ownership.protection: All rights, titles, and interests in the SonnaLab Materials are protected by copyright, trademark law, and other intellectual property laws. No ownership rights are transferred to you through your use of the Service.

license.title: 2. User License Grant
license.content: As detailed in our Terms of Service, SonnaLab grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use the Service and SonnaLab Materials solely for their intended purpose, in accordance with the terms of your chosen license plan.
license.restrictions: This license does not allow you to copy, modify, distribute, sell, or rent any part of the SonnaLab Materials, nor to reverse engineer or attempt to extract source code, except as permitted by law or with our written permission.

userData.title: 3. User Content and Data
userData.ownership: You retain full ownership of the data, files, content, and any other information you transmit through the SonnaLab Service ("Your Data").
userData.grant: By using the Service, you grant SonnaLab a necessary, worldwide, royalty-free license to process, store, analyze, and display Your Data solely for the purpose of providing, maintaining, securing, and improving the Service. We do not claim any ownership rights over Your Data.

openSource.title: 4. Open Source Components
openSource.content: SonnaLab may integrate certain open source software components. Your use of these components is subject to the terms of their respective open source licenses. We strive to comply with all applicable open source license requirements.

trademarks.title: 5. Trademarks
trademarks.content: The SonnaLab name, logo, and all associated product or service names or slogans are registered trademarks of SONNALAB, registered with RCS Cergy under number 920978210 in France. You may not use these trademarks without our prior written permission.

infringement.title: 6. Reporting Infringement
infringement.content: If you believe that content on the SonnaLab Service infringes your intellectual property rights, please notify us promptly with detailed information so we can investigate and take appropriate action.

contact.title: 7. Contact Us
contact.content: For any questions regarding this Intellectual Property Policy, please contact our legal team at:
